title: Security: Chrome OS : Multiple bugs in cros_gralloc
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
cros_gralloc is chrome os implementation of Android gralloc for arcvm, it will in gralloc.cros.so inside arcvm.  
https://source.chromium.org/chromiumos/chromiumos/codesearch/+/main:src/platform/minigbm/cros_gralloc/  
  
gralloc is for android graphics allocation,
